ABOUT Amex-capital

Amex-capital is a leading blockchain based mining and investment platform where investors and traders meet to carry out operations involving digital assets transactions based on artificial intelligence (AI) approach. Amex-capital is operating under the USA established company known as American Express with the company number #12476727.

Amex-capital provides our clients with an opportunity to grow their finance in the secured environment without any need to learn any complex trading skills. There are no super risky ventures that could leave you figuring your extinction, and we hold great satisfaction in managing secure, profitable conditions where our clients benefit with minimal fuss and optimal convenience. Amex-capital Expert team is empowered to delivering a simple, automated and easy-to-use regularity for financing and grow in the booming crypto marketplace.

what do we offer to
our investors?

Uniform Lucrative Maturity

Amex-capital is a competent and strong franchise which offers consecutive growth on your existing finances on an continuous cyclic basis.

Prompt Retreats

Our all retreats are treated spontaneously once requested. There is not maximum limits. Minimum withdrawal amount is only $23.

Professional Support

We provide 24/7 customer support through e-mail and telegram. Our support representatives are periodically available to elucidate any difficulty.
